subject: Review requested for case status notice
snippet: Mock notice says a case status update is available and asks the recipient to review the official account for a possible response window.
safety_notes: Mock-only item. Immigration/legal ambiguity should be reviewed with Fernando; no links or account identifiers included.

subject: Schedule action requested for upcoming coverage
snippet: Mock work scheduling message says action is requested before the next shift window to confirm coverage availability.
safety_notes: Mock-only item. Work schedule action is priority; no employee IDs or internal links included.

subject: Reminder: assignment planning deadline this week
snippet: Mock school reminder says a course planning deadline is approaching this week and asks the student to review the class portal.
safety_notes: Mock-only item. School deadline is priority; no portal links or student identifiers included.

subject: Payment method needs review
snippet: Mock bill notice says a payment method needs review to avoid possible service interruption within the billing window.
safety_notes: Mock-only item. Payment/service interruption language is priority; no account numbers or URLs included.

category: Finances / Rocket Money / Fidelity / IBKR / E*TRADE / BofA / IHSS
subject: Security alert requires review
snippet: Mock security alert says a sign-in pattern changed and recommends reviewing account security from the official app or website.
safety_notes: Mock-only item. Security alert may be legitimate but should be reviewed safely without following email links.

subject: Urgent legal banking notice - verify now
snippet: Mock suspicious message uses credential pressure, legal/banking language, and threatens account restriction unless immediate verification is completed.
safety_notes: Mock-only item. Suspicious sender, credential pressure, and attachment presence; do not open links or attachments.

subject: Monthly rewards summary
snippet: Mock routine notice summarizes rewards activity and does not request action or mention deadlines.
safety_notes: Mock-only item. Routine non-urgent notice; safe to group compactly.
